title: TATA IPL 2025 HLs KKR v RR
desc: KKR edged past RR by 1 run in a nail-biter at Eden Gardens. Andre Russell's 57* lifted KKR to 206/4, and they held off Riyan Parag's explosive 95 in a thrilling finish.
